api_key.description: Awin API OAuth2 bearer token. Used only for Bearer auth; never logged.

advertiserId.description: Numeric Awin advertiser account ID; substituted into every stream's path.

base_url.description: Awin API base URL override for tests or proxies.

start_date.description: Lower bound for the transactions stream's date window, in Awin's exact 'YYYY-MM-DDTHH:MM:SS' wire format (no timezone suffix). Unlike legacy, this bundle does not normalize an RFC3339 or YYYY-MM-DD value for you — see docs.md's Known limits.

mode.description: Runtime mode: live (default) or fixture for credential-free conformance.
